# AzaDrive

> Unified multi-Google Drive storage gateway. Connect multiple Google Drive accounts and manage files from one dashboard, with team workspaces, shared links, automation, and an S3-compatible API. Runs on Cloudflare Workers, D1, and Pages.

AzaDrive is a self-hostable edge storage gateway (fork of OmniDrive). It is not a consumer cloud provider; it sits in front of Google Drive accounts you connect via OAuth.

## Pages

- [Home](https://azadrive.my.id/home): Public product landing page
- [App / Login](https://azadrive.my.id/login): Sign in or register (invitation code required for new accounts)
- [Terms of Service](https://azadrive.my.id/terms): Legal terms
- [Privacy Policy](https://azadrive.my.id/privacy): Privacy policy

## Product

- Multi-drive accounts via Google OAuth
- Unified file browsing across connected drives
- Team workspaces with RBAC, quotas, and audit logging
- Password-protected shared links with optional expiry and download limits
- Automation rules (auto-move / auto-delete by name or extension)
- Background sync via Google Drive Changes API
- S3-compatible object storage API (path-style; workspaces as buckets)

## Optional

- [Source (maintainer fork)](https://github.com/asmaraputra/OmniDrive): Application source code
- [Upstream OmniDrive](https://github.com/abilfida/OmniDrive): Original open-source project
